title: Adverse event following immunization or vaccination in children in Minas Gerais: 2015 to 2020.
ehr_evidence: based on event notifications available in the National Immunization Program Information System (SI-PNI)
summary: Descriptive study of immunization errors and adverse events in children aged 0-9 in Minas Gerais, Brazil, from 2015 to 2020.
key_findings: 3,259 immunization errors recorded (0.008% of total doses)
91.86% of errors did not result in adverse events
Most frequent error: application outside recommended age (29.12%)
Fever was the most common manifestation (40.85%)
population: children aged 0-9 years in Minas Gerais, Brazil
